context: Tests whether the Core Motion skill covers advanced watchOS batched sensors, headphone motion, and water submersion setup with current Apple API constraints.

checklist.name: Batched support and authorization
checklist.description: Uses CMBatchedSensorManager only after checking support and authorization.

checklist.name: Read-only frequency
checklist.description: Does not assign accelerometerDataFrequency or deviceMotionDataFrequency and treats them as reported read-only frequencies.

checklist.name: Batched availability
checklist.description: Mentions watchOS 10+ async batched update sequences or otherwise gates batched update APIs by availability.

checklist.name: Headphone/submersion privacy
checklist.description: Includes NSMotionUsageDescription for headphone motion and submersion access.

checklist.name: Headphone connection handling
checklist.description: Uses CMHeadphoneMotionManager delegate or connection-status updates for connect/disconnect behavior.

checklist.name: Depth capability distinction
checklist.description: Distinguishes Shallow Depth and Pressure capability for 6-meter dives from the full Submerged Depth and Pressure entitlement for 40-meter dives.

checklist.name: Underwater background mode
checklist.description: Adds WKBackgroundModes with underwater-depth for dive sessions/autolaunch and does not claim only Apple Watch Ultra can support shallow depth.
